summary.zh: 在指针悬停时强化可交互性，同时保持布局稳定。
summary.en: Reinforce interactivity on pointer hover while keeping layout stable.

definition.zh: 光标移到元素上方时产生的视觉变化。
definition.en: Pointer hover updates a control's visual state to signal availability or affordance.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 控制元素移动的空间距离。
description.en: Controls how far the element travels.

description.zh: 控制元素相对最终尺寸的起始比例。
description.en: Controls the starting size relative to the final state.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 在精细指针悬停时强化可交互性，并保持布局和点击目标稳定。
purpose.en: Reinforce interactivity on fine-pointer hover while keeping layout and hit targets stable.

frequency.zh: 适合高频控件，但幅度和时长需保持极小。
frequency.en: Suitable for frequent controls when amplitude and duration remain very small.

trigger.zh: 仅在 hover:hover 且 pointer:fine 时由 pointerenter 触发。
trigger.en: Trigger on pointerenter only when hover:hover and pointer:fine match.

enterExit.zh: 悬停时进入强调态，指针离开时快速恢复；两端均保持内容位置稳定。
enterExit.en: Enter the emphasized state on hover and restore quickly on leave, keeping content position stable.

interruptibility.zh: 指针快速穿过时从当前样式返回，禁止排队播放。
interruptibility.en: Return from current styles during rapid pointer movement without queuing animations.

gestureRules.zh: 触摸设备不模拟悬停；焦点可见状态提供等价提示。
gestureRules.en: Touch devices do not emulate hover, and focus-visible provides equivalent affordance.

reducedMotion.zh: 保留静态悬停和焦点颜色、边框或阴影变化，取消位移与缩放。
reducedMotion.en: Keep static hover and focus color, border, or shadow changes while removing travel and scale.

reviewNotes.zh: 确保 hover 不承担唯一信息。
reviewNotes.en: Keep hover from carrying unique information.

reviewNotes.zh: 检查阴影和变换不会引发布局抖动。
reviewNotes.en: Ensure shadow and transform changes do not cause layout movement.
